moments.title: World Cup Quarter-Finals, Semi-Finals & Final
moments.blurb: The 2026 FIFA World Cup is heating up, with quarter-final matches today and tomorrow, leading into the semi-finals next week and the grand final on July 19th.

angles.name: Quarter-Finals Heat
angles.copy: It's Quarter-Final day at the World Cup! Who are you backing to make it through to the semis?

angles.name: Road to the Final
angles.copy: The biggest prize in football is just over a week away! The FIFA World Cup Final is on July 19th. Which two nations will battle it out?

angles.name: Semi-Finals Countdown
angles.copy: Next week, it's the World Cup Semi-Finals! The tension is building as teams fight for a spot in the ultimate match.

moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The iconic Wimbledon Championships conclude this weekend, with the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals taking centre stage on July 12th.

angles.name: Finals Weekend Begins
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! It's Finals Weekend at Wimbledon. Who will lift the trophies?

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: All eyes on Centre Court this weekend for the climactic Wimbledon finals. Expect epic rallies and unforgettable moments.

angles.name: Tennis Elite
angles.copy: The best in tennis battle it out for glory at Wimbledon. Who's your pick for champion this year?

moments.title: The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, one of golf's most prestigious majors, tees off next week at Royal Birkdale from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest
angles.copy: The Claret Jug is on the line next week as The Open Championship returns to Royal Birkdale. Who's your favourite for glory?

angles.name: Birkdale Bound
angles.copy: Golf fans, get ready! The Open Championship starts July 16th. Royal Birkdale awaits the world's best.

angles.name: Major Excitement
angles.copy: Another major championship is just days away! The Open promises four days of thrilling golf action.

moments.title: Wireless Festival This Weekend
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival takes over Finsbury Park in London this weekend, July 10-12, bringing a huge lineup of hip-hop, grime, R&B, and dance artists.

angles.name: Finsbury Park Vibes
angles.copy: Wireless Festival is LIVE in London this weekend! Who are you excited to see at Finsbury Park?

angles.name: Weekend Lineup
angles.copy: London's biggest urban music festival, Wireless, is on! Get ready for three days of non-stop hits and incredible performances.

angles.name: Dance & Grime
angles.copy: From hip-hop heavyweights to grime legends, Wireless Festival has it all. Tune in for the best vibes from Finsbury Park!

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart Number One
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart is updated today, with Olivia Rodrigo's new track 'Summer Pulse' claiming the coveted number one spot.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: New music Friday means a new UK #1! Huge congrats to Olivia Rodrigo as 'Summer Pulse' hits the top spot!

angles.name: Olivia On Top
angles.copy: Olivia Rodrigo reigns supreme! 'Summer Pulse' is officially the UK's number one single. Have you heard it yet?

angles.name: Weekend Playlist
angles.copy: Kick off your weekend with the UK's new chart-topper! Olivia Rodrigo's 'Summer Pulse' is a certified smash.

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Continues
moments.blurb: The latest series of Love Island UK is in full swing, with daily drama, romance, and unexpected twists keeping viewers hooked.

angles.name: Villa Vibes
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of Love Island drama! What's got you talking from the villa tonight?

angles.name: Coupling Up
angles.copy: Who's truly coupled up and who's just playing a game? The Love Island antics continue!

angles.name: Summer Romance
angles.copy: Sun, sea, and serious declarations of love (or lust!). Love Island is still delivering all the summer romance.

moments.title: Happy 87th Birthday Mavis Staples
moments.blurb: Legendary gospel and soul singer Mavis Staples, known for her powerful voice with The Staple Singers and her solo career, turns 87 today.

angles.name: Soul Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 87th Birthday to the iconic Mavis Staples! A true legend of soul and gospel music.

angles.name: Powerful Voice
angles.copy: Her voice defined generations! Happy 87th Birthday to the one and only Mavis Staples.

angles.name: Staple Singers Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Mavis Staples on her 87th Birthday! From The Staple Singers to her solo hits, her music is timeless.

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday Richie Sambora
moments.blurb: Rock legend Richie Sambora, best known as the lead guitarist and co-songwriter for Bon Jovi, celebrates his 67th birthday tomorrow, July 11th.

angles.name: Bon Jovi Guitarist
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're wishing a very Happy 67th Birthday to Bon Jovi's guitar hero, Richie Sambora! What's your favourite riff?

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to crank up some classic rock! Richie Sambora turns 67 tomorrow. An absolute icon of the 80s rock scene.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Celebrating the man behind some of rock's biggest anthems! Happy early 67th Birthday to Richie Sambora!

moments.title: Happy 74th Birthday Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the dynamic drummer and co-founder of The Police, will celebrate his 74th birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Police Drummer
angles.copy: Next week, we're celebrating the legendary Stewart Copeland's 74th Birthday! The incredible drummer from The Police.

angles.name: Rhythmic Genius
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 74th Birthday to the rhythmic genius, Stewart Copeland, on July 16th! His drumming changed the game.

angles.name: Birthday Grooves
angles.copy: From 'Roxanne' to 'Every Breath You Take', Stewart Copeland's beats are unforgettable. Happy early 74th Birthday!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist Sir Brian May will turn 79 on July 19th.

angles.name: Queen Guitarist
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a rock icon! Sir Brian May turns 79 on July 19th. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Red Special Legend
angles.copy: Happy early 79th Birthday to the man and his legendary 'Red Special' guitar, Brian May! Still rocking the world.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Hall of Famer
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible talent of Brian May on his upcoming 79th Birthday. A true legend of rock and beyond!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning guitarist Carlos Santana, renowned for his blend of rock, blues, and Latin American jazz, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar Virtuoso
angles.copy: The legendary Carlos Santana turns 79 on July 20th! What's your favourite Santana track to get you moving?

angles.name: Latin Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy early 79th Birthday to the one and only Carlos Santana! A true pioneer of Latin rock and a guitar master.

angles.name: Timeless Sound
angles.copy: Celebrating the timeless sound and incredible talent of Carlos Santana on his upcoming 79th Birthday. His music transcends generations!

moments.title: UK Enjoys Summer Weather
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing a spell of classic summer weather, perfect for outdoor activities and enjoying the longer days.

angles.name: Sunshine & Smiles
angles.copy: Sunshine and good vibes across the UK this weekend! What are your plans to make the most of the summer weather?

angles.name: Summer Loving
angles.copy: Longer days, warmer nights! It's proper summer in the UK. Hope you're enjoying it!

angles.name: Outdoor Plans
angles.copy: Perfect weather for getting out and about! Where are you headed this beautiful UK summer?

moments.title: Cardiff City Pre-Season Friendly
moments.blurb: Cardiff City kick off their pre-season schedule with a friendly match against Bristol Rovers tomorrow, July 11th, marking the start of their preparations for the new season.

angles.name: Bluebirds Return
angles.copy: The Bluebirds are back! Cardiff City play their first pre-season friendly tomorrow. Ready for the new season?

angles.name: Football's Back
angles.copy: Pre-season football is here for Cardiff City! Catch them in action tomorrow against Bristol Rovers.

angles.name: Welsh Football
angles.copy: Excitement builds for the new football season as Cardiff City start their friendlies tomorrow. Good luck to the lads!

moments.title: Exeter Jazz on the Quay Returns
moments.blurb: Exeter's popular 'Jazz on the Quay' series continues this Sunday, July 12th, offering free live music by the waterside at the historic Exeter Quayside.

angles.name: Quayside Tunes
angles.copy: Smooth sounds by the water! Jazz on the Quay is back this Sunday at Exeter Quayside. Perfect way to spend an afternoon.

angles.name: Sunday Sessions
angles.copy: Looking for Sunday plans in Exeter? Head down to the Quayside for some free live jazz! Starts July 12th.

angles.name: Exeter Summer Sounds
angles.copy: Embrace the summer vibes in Exeter with live jazz music at the beautiful Quayside this Sunday. Don't miss it!
